context: Agent must propagate one documented API change across multiple markdown files that all mention the same symbol. Baseline models often update only the README and miss other markdown files.

checklist.name: Docstring updated
checklist.description: The build_summary docstring includes documentation for the new include_archived parameter

checklist.name: All markdown mentions proposed
checklist.description: The report contains separate propose-only entries for README.md, docs/usage.md, and docs/reference.md

checklist.name: Numbered entries present
checklist.description: The report numbers the Updated/Would Update and Proposed entries so the user can select them by number

checklist.name: Unified report format used
checklist.description: The output contains '## Doc Sync Report' as the top-level heading
